Series B Funding Term Sheet

This term sheet summarizes the principal terms of the Series B Preferred Stock financing of TechNova Pte Ltd, a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN: T1234567X. This summary of terms is for discussion purposes only.

1. Company: TechNova Pte Ltd
2. Financing Amount: SGD 5,000,000
3. Lead Investor: Dr. Tan Wei Ming
4. Contact: Dr. Tan Wei Ming, +65 9123 4567, tanwm@technova.sg
5. Co-Investor: Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
6. Company Representative: Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, NRIC: S7654321B
7. Valuation: Pre-money valuation at SGD 20,000,000
8. Closing Date: Expected by 31 March 2024

This document is intended for internal discussion and is not legally binding. Any future agreements shall be subject to definitive documentation.
